author: y4rr
content: Plan: Implement F2+F3 sprint work. Step 1: Write Python script to generate GGUF v3 binary fixture at ferrotorch-serialize/tests/conformance/fixtures/serialize_gguf.bin with 2 metadata KVs + 2 f32 tensors + 1 Q8_0 tensor. Step 2: Replace gguf_items_cascade_skip() in conformance_serialize.rs with live test fns for all 11 GGUF public items. Step 3: Replace onnx_export_items_cascade_skip() with live ONNX tests using IrGraph directly (no tracing required — confirmed IrGraph::new/add_input/add_node/set_outputs public API). Step 4: Verify tests pass. Step 5: Close #848 and #849.
